title: Li Auto Earnings Dates, Call Summary and Reports
text: Li Auto Inc. earnings dates and forecast information: Li Auto Inc. plans to release its unaudited first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 28, 2026. Recent quarter data shows Li Auto reported $0.026 EPS in relation to $0.66 expected by the market, indicating a significant miss on earnings expectations. In the last quarter, Li Auto achieved revenue of RMB 20.79 billion, up 0.29% year-over-year. Analyst forecasts for Li Auto show mixed views. LI's earnings are expected to grow significantly over the next 3 years, with revenue (16.2% per year) forecast to grow faster than the US market (10.5% per year). The company is entering a new product cycle with the upcoming Li Auto L9 Livis launch while contending with fiercer competition, shifting from its extended-range roots toward pure electric models and AI-enabled driving features. Earnings delivery will be critical for validating the company's strategic transition.
